结节病.summary: 结节病相关间质性肺病的胸部高分辨率CT影像模式（如结节、磨玻璃影等）与疾病严重程度及病理生理相关。

结节病.title: Latest Management of Cardiac Sarcoidosis: A Comprehensive Review.
结节病.authors: Alhareth D, Ghazawi AE, Ajami S, Saifi Z, Refaat M
结节病.summary: 心脏结节病管理需综合药物、器械、手术和生活方式干预，但个体化治疗和指南缺失仍是主要挑战。

ILD.title: Rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: screening, diagnosis, and treatment-an expert group consensus statement.
ILD.authors: Solomon JJ, Dieude P, Matson SM, Lee JS, Rojas-Serrano J, Sebastiani M, Gonzalez A, Demoruelle MK, Hoffman-Vold AM, Kam MLW, Swigris JJ, Sparks JA, Brown KK, Cottin V, Kellermeyer LM, Wilson KC, Waseda Y, Crestani B, Walsh SLF, Poletti V, Doyle T, Koduri G, Kelly C, Danoff S, Dellaripa PF
ILD.summary: 该共识提供了RA-ILD的筛查、诊断和治疗指导，以促进及时诊断和恰当治疗。

ILD.title: Lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Bendstrup E, Dieude P, Kreuter M, Hoffmann-Vold AM, Cottin V, Hauge EM
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎患者常见肺部病变包括慢阻肺、间质性肺病和肺癌，吸烟是主要风险因素。

ILD.title: Osimertinib plus datopotamab deruxtecan in patients with EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC after progression on first-line osimertinib: ORCHARD.
ILD.authors: Riess JW, Yu HA, Le X, de Langen AJ, Cho BC, Piotrowska Z, Hendriks LEL, Morabito A, Bonanno L, Brustugun OT, Halvorsen TO, Kim YJ, Marrone KA, Shiraishi Y, Goldman JW, Ambrose H, Smith PE, FraenkeI PG, Tang KH, Lehman JM, Goldberg SB
ILD.summary: 奥希替尼联合Dato-DXd在奥希替尼一线耐药后EGFR突变晚期NSCLC中显示43%客观缓解率和9.5个月无进展生存期。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.
ILD.authors: Hong SD, Wang YS, Zhao HY, Zhao YY, Wang QM, Ma YX, Li YS, Huang Y, Yang YP, Fu ZM, Chen LK, Zhou F, Yang J, Li XY, Hou X, Zhou NN, Sun LH, Zhang GF, Cui JW, Wu L, Chen G, Zhang YX, Wang HY, Lv DQ, Shi JH, Jiang B, Li C, Li XL, Tang KJ, Yu Y, Ji YH, He ZY, Zhu Y, Zhu H, Xiao S, Zhou CC, Zhang L, Fang WF
ILD.summary: Iza-bren在EGFR突变型NSCLC中显示47.4%的客观缓解率和良好安全性。

ILD.title: Immunotherapy-related interstitial lung disease: a call to improve risk stratification and diagnostic consistency.
ILD.authors: Fabbri L, Antoniou K, Blum TG, Camus P, Cazes A, Chorostowska-Wynimko J, Foidart P, Hardavella G, Heuvelmans MA, Karampitsakos T, Kreuter M, Pereira Catarata MJ, Naidoo J, Passaro A, Peters S, Prosch H, Russell AM, Tarnoki DL, Porter JC, Guiot J
ILD.summary: 标准化免疫治疗前风险评估，多学科协作可改善间质性肺炎的早期诊断和管理。

ILD.title: Pulmonary toxicity of immune-checkpoint inhibitors.
ILD.authors: Mahiat C, Cadranel J, Fallet V, Meteye C, Gendarme S, Slomka J, Canellas A
ILD.summary: 免疫检查点抑制剂相关肺炎虽罕见但致命，需早期识别并管理，高危人群应特别关注。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease and the STING pathway.
ILD.authors: Velu PP, Zhu G, Mackenzie KJ
ILD.summary: STING通路在罕见遗传性间质性肺病发病中起关键作用，但对常见类型ILD的相关性尚不明确。

ILD.title: Longitudinal Trajectories of Antisynthetase Syndrome-associated Interstitial Lung Disease.
ILD.authors: Billotte M, Camara H, Meyer A, Moulinet T, Bolko L, Didier K, Dury S, Bonnotte B, Devilliers H, Bonniaud P, Beltramo G, Campagne J, Magy-Bertrand N, Chaudier A, Valentin S, Jaussaud R, Decker P
ILD.summary: 抗合成酶综合征相关间质性肺病存在三种纵向轨迹：中间基线但逐渐下降型、高基线稳定型、低基线快速进展后改善型。

ILD.title: Predictors of rapidly progressive interstitial lung disease in anti-MDA5 dermatomyositis: a meta-analysis.
ILD.authors: Liu T, Ji X, Wei Y, Zhong Y, Zhu J, Wang C, Li M
ILD.summary: 抗MDA5皮肌炎患者中高龄、男性、发热、皮肤溃疡、关节炎、CRP/LDH/AST升高均为快速进展性间质性肺病的独立预测因素。

ILD.title: Methodological considerations for quantitative computed tomography-based prognosis in fibrotic interstitial lung disease.
ILD.journal: Am J Respir Crit Care Med
ILD.authors: Hong Y, Shu Z
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Type I interferon pathway activation in connective tissue disease associated interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Defesche TM, Koudstaal T, Versnel MA, Corneth OBJ, Brkic Z
ILD.summary: 结缔组织病相关间质性肺病中I型干扰素通路激活促进肺功能恶化，靶向该通路是潜在治疗方向。

ILD.title: The evolving comorbidity landscape of rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Brooks RT, England BR, Kronzer VL, Crowson CS
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎共病谱演变，间质性肺病、焦虑抑郁负担升高，需加强筛查预防。

ILD.title: Occupational interstitial lung disease requiring living-donor lung transplantation: multielement deposition in explanted lungs.
ILD.authors: Sugino K, Ono H, Igarashi S, Hebisawa A
ILD.summary: 长期职业性吸入多种工业粉尘可导致不可逆性间质性肺炎，需肺移植治疗，术后预后良好。

ILD.title: Diagnostic, prognostic and therapeutic biomarkers in rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Szekanecz Z, Gunkl-Toth L, Szamosi S, van der Woude D, McInnes I, Nagy G
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎亟需诊断和预后生物标志物以实现早期干预和精准治疗。

ILD.title: Integrated machine learning risk model for predicting radiation pneumonitis in lung cancer patients with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Lu H, Jiang A, Yuan Z, Chen D
ILD.summary: 机器学习模型整合多模态数据，可有效预测合并间质性肺病的肺癌患者发生放射性肺炎的风险。

ILD.title: Prognostic Value of Bronchoalveolar Lavage in Systemic Autoimmune Rheumatic Diseases-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease.
ILD.authors: Gysan MR, Kastrati K, Pochepnia S, Prosch H, Lehmann A, Lee S, Renner A, Bal C, Papaporfyriou A, Milacek C, Antoniewicz L, Metekol S, Kramer M, John L, Kargarpour Z, Aykara I, Weber P, Anderle K, Kiener HP, Bonelli M, Mrak D, Aletaha D, El-Gazzar A, Gompelmann D, Idzko M, Lechner-Radner H
ILD.summary: 支气管肺泡灌洗液淋巴细胞计数升高与系统性自身免疫性风湿病相关间质性肺病进展风险降低相关。

ILD.title: Prevalence and screening of interstitial lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Gono T
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Inhaled nitric oxide in fibrotic and advanced interstitial lung disease: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
ILD.authors: Nakahara S, Hirao Y, Fujiuchi B, Matsuda B
ILD.summary: 吸入一氧化氮可改善间质性肺疾病患者6分钟步行距离和体力活动，但需关注不良事件风险。

ILD.title: Lymphoid interstitial pneumonia in Sjogren disease: clinical course and comparison with other interstitial lung disease patterns.
ILD.authors: La Rocca G, Ferro F, Uggenti V, Dei B, Fulvio G, Moretti M, Morganti R, Sambataro G, Mosca M, Romei C, Baldini C
ILD.summary: 干燥综合征相关淋巴细胞间质性肺炎患者肺功能多保持稳定，且预后优于其他间质性肺炎类型。

ILD.title: Using Genetic Risk Scores for Rheumatoid Arthritis-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease Risk Stratification.
ILD.authors: McDermott GC, Sparks JA
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。
